response.overview: Experience this groundbreaking family favourite like never before! Led by conductor Nicholas Buc, Queensland Symphony Orchestra performs the soundtrack of Disney and Pixar’s Toy Story (1995) live-to-screen in QPAC’s Concert Hall, bringing Woody, Buzz and all of your favourite characters to life. Disney and Pixar’s Toy Story in Concert features a complete screening of the film, accompanied live by full orchestra performing Oscar® and Grammy®-winning composer Randy Newman’s iconic score, including the hit song “You’ve Got a Friend in Me”. Beloved by audiences of all ages, Disney and Pixar’s Toy Story has captivated generations with its unforgettable characters, extraordinary storytelling, stunning visuals and timeless music. Make the most of the April holidays with a big-screen family event that brings together cinema, live music and one of Disney and Pixar’s most-loved stories on the Concert Hall stage.
response.title: Toy Story in Concert
